en: "whole" or "all", i.e. complete (in extent, amount, time or degree), especially (neuter) as noun or adverb
kjv: all, altogether, every whit, + throughout, whole

en: a sight, i.e. (by implication) the eye
to swear, i.e. take (or declare on) oath
to assimilate, i.e. compare; passively, to become similar
similarly
to defame, i.e. rail at, chide, taunt
kjv: cast in teeth, (suffer) reproach, revile, upbraid

en: belonging to a ass, i.e. large (so as to be turned by a ass)
a "name" (literally or figuratively) (authority, character)
really
kjv: certainly, clean, indeed, of a truth, verily

en: vinegar, i.e. sour wine
from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)) with enclitic of source; from the rear (as a secure aspect), i.e. at the back (adverb and preposition of place or time)
to the back, i.e. aback (as adverb or preposition of time or place; or as noun)
what(-ever) where, i.e. at whichever spot
kjv: in what place, where(-as, -soever), whither (+ soever)

en: what(-ever) how, i.e. in the manner that (as adverb or conjunction of coincidence, intentional or actual)
by extension, to attend to; by Hebraism, to experience; passively, to appear
properly, desire (as a reaching forth or excitement of the mind), i.e. (by analogy), violent passion (ire, or (justifiable) abhorrence); by implication punishment
in a straight manner, i.e. (figuratively) correctly (also morally)
a boundary-line, i.e. (by implication) a frontier (region)
to put on oath, i.e. make swear; by analogy, to solemnly enjoin
perhaps akin to G3725 (ὅριον)); a limit, i.e. (sacred) restraint (specially, an oath)
to start, spur or urge on, i.e. (reflexively) to dash or plunge
perhaps akin to G142 (αἴρω); compare G3733 (ὄρνις)); a mountain (as lifting itself above the plain)
to "burrow" in the ground, i.e. dig
to dance (from the ranklike or regular motion)
the relatively (sometimes demonstrative) pronoun, who, which, what, that
kjv: one, (an-, the) other, some, that, what, which, who(-m, -se), etc

en: as (much, great, long, etc.) as
kjv: all (that), as (long, many, much) (as), how great (many, much), (in-)asmuch as, so many as, that (ever), the more, those things, what (great, -soever), wheresoever, wherewithsoever, which, X while, who(-soever)

en: which some, i.e. any that; also (definite) which same
kjv: X and (they), (such) as, (they) that, in that they, what(-soever), whereas ye, (they) which, who(-soever)

en: the loin (externally), i.e. the hip; internally (by extension) procreative power
whenever (implying hypothesis or more or less uncertainty); also causatively (conjunctionally) inasmuch as
kjv: as long (soon) as, that, + till, when(-soever), while

en: at which (thing) too, i.e. when
kjv: after (that), as soon as, that, when, while

en: demonstrative, that (sometimes redundant); causative, because
kjv: as concerning that, as though, because (that), for (that), how (that), (in) that, though, why

en: the absolute negative (compare G3361 (μή)) adverb; no or not
kjv: + long, nay, neither, never, no (X man), none, (can-)not, + nothing, + special, un(-worthy), when, + without, + yet but

en: "ah"
"woe"
not however, i.e. neither, nor, not even
kjv: neither (indeed), never, no (more, nor, not), nor (yet), (also, even, then) not (even, so much as), + nothing, so much as

en: not even one (man, woman or thing), i.e. none, nobody, nothing
kjv: any (man), aught, man, neither any (thing), never (man), no (man), none (+ of these things), not (any, at all, -thing), nought

en: not even at any time, i.e. never at all
kjv: neither at any time, never, nothing at any time

en: not yet, no longer
kjv: after that (not), (not) any more, henceforth (hereafter) not, no longer (more), not as yet (now), now no more (not), yet (not)

en: (adverbially) certainly, or (conjunctionally) accordingly
kjv: and (so, truly), but, now (then), so (likewise then), then, therefore, verily, wherefore

en: not yet
kjv: hitherto not, (no…) as yet, not yet

en: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
the ear (physically or mentally)
not too, i.e. neither or nor; by analogy, not even
kjv: neither, none, nor (yet), (no, yet) not, nothing

en: the he (she or it), i.e. this or that (often with article repeated)
kjv: he (it was that), hereof, it, she, such as, the same, these, they, this (man, same, woman), which, who

en: in this way (referring to what precedes or follows)
kjv: after that, after (in) this manner, as, even (so), for all that, like(-wise), no more, on this fashion(-wise), so (in like manner), thus, what

en: the eye (literally or figuratively); by implication, vision; figuratively, envy (from the jealous side-glance)
a snake, figuratively, (as a type of sly cunning) an artful malicious person, especially Satan
a throng (as borne along); by implication, the rabble; by extension, a class of people; figuratively, a riot
kjv: company, multitude, number (of people), people, press

en: (adverbially) late in the day; by extension, after the close of the day
late; feminine (as noun) afternoon (early eve) or nightfall (later eve)
from infancy
a childling (of either sex), i.e. (properly), an infant, or (by extension) a half-grown boy or girl; figuratively, an immature Christian
a girl, i.e. (specially), a female slave or servant
to hit (as if by a single blow and less violently than G5180 (τύπτω)); specially, to sting (as a scorpion)
(adverbially) formerly, or (by relatively) sometime since; (elliptically as adjective) ancient
kjv: any while, a great while ago, (of) old, in time past

en: antique, i.e. not recent, worn out
(adverbially) anew, i.e. (of place) back, (of time) once more, or (conjunctionally) furthermore or on the other hand
universally
from (i.e. on) all sides
every when, i.e. at all times

properly, near; i.e. (with genitive case) from beside (literally or figuratively), (with dative case) at (or in) the vicinity of (objectively or subjectively), (with accusative case) to the proximity with (local (especially beyond or opposed to) or causal (on account of)
kjv: above, against, among, at, before, by, contrary to, X friend, from, + give (such things as they), + that (she) had, X his, in, more than, nigh unto, (out) of, past, save, side…by, in the sight of, than, (there-)fore, with

en: a similitude ("parable"), i.e. (symbolic) fictitious narrative (of common life conveying a moral), apothegm or adage
to transmit a message, i.e. (by implication) to enjoin
to become near, i.e. approach (have arrived); by implication, to appear publicly
to lead near, i.e. (reflexively or intransitively) to go along or away
to accept near, i.e. admit or (by implication) delight in
to surrender, i.e yield up, intrust, transmit
kjv: betray, bring forth, cast, commit, deliver (up), give (over, up), hazard, put in prison, recommend

en: transmission, i.e. (concretely) a precept; specially, the Jewish traditionary law
to beg off, i.e. deprecate, decline, shun
to call near, i.e. invite, invoke (by imploration, hortation or consolation)
kjv: beseech, call for, (be of good) comfort, desire, (give) exhort(-ation), intreat, pray

en: to follow near, i.e. (figuratively) attend (as a result), trace out, conform to
kjv: attain, follow, fully know, have understanding

en: to mishear, i.e. (by implication) to disobey
to receive near, i.e. associate with oneself (in any familiar or intimate act or relation); by analogy, to assume an office; figuratively, to learn
as if dissolved, i.e. "paralytic"
to travel near
a side-slip (lapse or deviation), i.e. (unintentional) error or (wilful) transgression
readiness
to inspect alongside, i.e. note insidiously or scrupulously
to place alongside, i.e. present (food, truth); by implication, to deposit (as a trust or for protection)
kjv: allege, commend, commit (the keeping of), put forth, set before

en: to bear along or aside, i.e. carry off (literally or figuratively); by implication, to avert
to come near or aside, i.e. to approach (arrive), go by (or away), (figuratively) perish or neglect, (causative) avert
kjv: come (forth), go, pass (away, by, over), past, transgress

en: to hold near, i.e. present, afford, exhibit, furnish occasion
kjv: bring, do, give, keep, minister, offer, shew, + trouble

en: to stand beside, i.e. (transitively) to exhibit, proffer, (specially), recommend, (figuratively) substantiate; or (intransitively) to be at hand (or ready), aid
kjv: assist, bring before, command, commend, give presently, present, prove, provide, shew, stand (before, by, here, up, with), yield

en: alike nearly, i.e. similar
